title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding
innovation_summary: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding: To address this challenge, we propose Robust-TO, an agentic video understanding framework that explicitly integrates per-frame trustworthiness into every stage of reasoning.
